synopsis: As Simon Greyshade and Princess Leia prepare to leave The Wheel, Commander Zertik Strom, realizing he has been betrayed, sends his stormtroopers to stop them. Tired of being upstaged by Luke Skywalker's noble actions, Greyshade decides to let Luke and Leia leave with the droids aboard his ship while he stays behind to cover their escape. Strom confronts the wounded Greyshade seeking revenge, but Greyshade tosses a proton grenade that kills Strom while fatally wounding himself and crippling his droid Master-Com. Meanwhile, Chewbacca leaves the Big Game with Han Solo, who reveals that his apparent death was a ruse and he is unharmed. The two reach the *Millennium Falcon* and flee The Wheel just as they confront Darth Vader's battlecruiser. Piloting the space yacht, Luke stuns Vader through the Force just long enough for both Rebel craft to escape into hyperspace.
title: Star Wars (1977) #23: Flight Into Fury
